description: Leadmatic is a fully managed cold outbound email service that combines AI research and human expertise to generate qualified leads on a pay-per-reply basis.
overview: Leadmatic is a done-for-you cold email service that handles research, copywriting, sending, and campaign refinement so sales teams can book more meetings without building an in-house SDR team. Its pay-for-results pricing charges only $185 per positive reply, eliminating upfront fees and high overhead costs.
what_is: Leadmatic is a cold outbound email service built to grow sales pipelines by pairing AI-driven research with experienced human oversight. It sits within the sales development and marketing automation space, concentrating on lead generation and highly personalized outreach. Its defining characteristic is a performance-based pricing model: clients pay $185 per positive reply rather than a flat monthly fee, removing financial risk and aligning costs directly with results.

The service works best for teams that want qualified leads through personalized cold emails without committing significant internal time to the effort. Leadmatic manages every stage of the process, from prospect research and message drafting to sending and iterative campaign improvement, which means measurable outcomes typically appear quickly. This makes it a strong fit for companies seeking expert-run outbound programs without the overhead of hiring dedicated sales development staff.

Leadmatic operates as a fully managed outbound layer that complements existing CRM and data enrichment tools, taking care of deep contact research and email infrastructure management. It is not a self-service platform intended for do-it-yourself marketers, nor does it function as a standalone CRM. It is best suited to organizations where high-quality, expert-driven outreach is the priority and building an in-house SDR function is not practical or cost-effective.
